option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="tn.esprit.controllers.forum.AdminPostManagementController" style="-fx-background-color: #f0f4f9;"> <top> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="16" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-border-color: transparent transparent #e2e8f0 transparent; -fx-border-width: 0 0 1 0;"> <padding> <Insets top="18" right="28" bottom="18" left="28"/> </padding> <Button text="Back to Posts" onAction="#handleBack" style="-fx-background-color: #f1f5f9; -fx-text-fill: #475569; -fx-font-size: 13px; -fx-font-weight: 600; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-cursor: hand; -fx-padding: 8 16 8 16; -fx-border-color: #e2e8f0; -fx-border-width: 1;"/> <VBox spacing="3"> <Label text="Admin Post Management" style="-fx-text-fill: #0f172a; -fx-font-weight: 700;"> <font> <Font size="24"/> </font> </Label> <Label text="Review all forum posts and remove any post when needed." style="-fx-text-fill: #64748b; -fx-font-size: 13px;"/> <Label fx:id="currentUserLabel" style="-fx-text-fill: #1d4ed8; -fx-font-weight: 700; -fx-font-size: 12px;"/> </VBox> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button text="Refresh" onAction="#handleRefresh" style="-fx-background-color: #1d4ed8; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 13px; -fx-font-weight: 700; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-cursor: hand; -fx-padding: 8 16 8 16;"/> </HBox> </top> <center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-background: transparent; -fx-border-color: transparent;"> <content> <VBox fx:id="postsContainer" spacing="16" alignment="TOP_CENTER"> <padding> <Insets top="28" right="48" bottom="48" left="48"/> </padding> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="tn.esprit.controllers.forum.AdminPostManagementController" stylesheets="@macos-theme.css" styleClass="root-alt"> <top> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="16" styleClass="toolbar-card"> <padding> <Insets top="18" right="28" bottom="18" left="28"/> </padding> <Button text="Back to Posts" onAction="#handleBack" styleClass="secondary-button"/> <VBox spacing="3"> <Label text="Admin Post Management" styleClass="page-title"/> <Label text="Review all forum posts and remove any post when needed." styleClass="page-subtitle"/> <Label fx:id="currentUserLabel" styleClass="section-title"/> </VBox> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button text="Refresh" onAction="#handleRefresh" styleClass="primary-button"/> </HBox> </top> <center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" styleClass="front-scroll-pane"> <content> <VBox fx:id="postsContainer" spacing="16" alignment="TOP_CENTER"> <padding> <Insets top="28" right="48" bottom="48" left="48"/> </padding> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Button?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Label?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>

<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1"
            fx:controller="tn.esprit.controllers.forum.PostOverviewController"
            stylesheets="@macos-theme.css"
            styleClass="root-alt">

    <top>
        <VBox spacing="0">

            <!-- Top gradient accent bar -->
            <Region styleClass="gradient-accent"/>

            <!-- Header row -->
            <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="20"
                  styleClass="toolbar-card">
                <padding>
                    <Insets top="20" right="32" bottom="20" left="32"/>
                </padding>

                <VBox spacing="3">
                    <HBox spacing="8" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
                        <Label text="●" style="-fx-text-fill: #3f72ff; -fx-font-size: 10px;"/>
                        <Label text="Community Forum"
                               styleClass="page-title"/>
                    </HBox>
                    <Label text="Browse discussions and share your thoughts with the community."
                           styleClass="page-subtitle"/>
                    <Label fx:id="currentUserLabel"
                           styleClass="section-title"/>
                </VBox>

                <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>

                <Button fx:id="adminPostsButton" text="Admin Posts" onAction="#handleOpenAdminPosts" managed="false" visible="false"
                        styleClass="secondary-button"/>

                <Button text="+ New Post" onAction="#handleCreatePost"
                        style="-fx-background-color: #6366f1;
                               -fx-text-fill: white;
                               -fx-font-weight: 700;
                               -fx-font-size: 14px;
                               -fx-background-radius: 10;
                               -fx-border-radius: 10;
                               -fx-cursor: hand;
                               -fx-padding: 11 22 11 22;"/>
            </HBox>

            <!-- Search and Filter bar -->
            <HBox spacing="10" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"
                  style="-fx-background-color: #f8faff;
                         -fx-border-color: transparent transparent #e8edf5 transparent;
                         -fx-border-width: 0 0 1 0;">
                <padding>
                    <Insets top="14" right="32" bottom="14" left="32"/>
                </padding>

                <TextField fx:id="searchField"
                           promptText="Search by title, topic, or content..."
                           onAction="#handleSearch"
                           style="-fx-background-color: white;
                                  -fx-border-color: #e2e8f0;
                                  -fx-border-radius: 9;
                                  -fx-background-radius: 9;
                                  -fx-border-width: 1.5;
                                  -fx-padding: 9 14 9 14;
                                  -fx-font-size: 13px;
                                  -fx-text-fill: #1e293b;
                                  -fx-prompt-text-fill: #94a3b8;"
                           HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>

                <ComboBox fx:id="typeFilterComboBox" onAction="#handleSearch"
                          style="-fx-background-color: white;
                                 -fx-border-color: #e2e8f0;
                                 -fx-border-radius: 9;
                                 -fx-background-radius: 9;
                                 -fx-border-width: 1.5;
                                 -fx-font-size: 13px;"
                          prefWidth="150"/>

                <ComboBox fx:id="topicFilterComboBox" onAction="#handleSearch"
                          style="-fx-background-color: white;
                                 -fx-border-color: #e2e8f0;
                                 -fx-border-radius: 9;
                                 -fx-background-radius: 9;
                                 -fx-border-width: 1.5;
                                 -fx-font-size: 13px;"
                          prefWidth="150"/>

                <Button text="Search" onAction="#handleSearch"
                        style="-fx-background-color: #6366f1;
                               -fx-text-fill: white;
                               -fx-font-weight: 700;
                               -fx-font-size: 13px;
                               -fx-background-radius: 9;
                               -fx-border-radius: 9;
                               -fx-cursor: hand;
                               -fx-padding: 9 20 9 20;"/>

                <Button text="Reset" onAction="#handleResetFilters"
                        style="-fx-background-color: white;
                               -fx-text-fill: #64748b;
                               -fx-font-weight: 600;
                               -fx-font-size: 13px;
                               -fx-background-radius: 9;
                               -fx-border-radius: 9;
                               -fx-border-color: #e2e8f0;
                               -fx-border-width: 1.5;
                               -fx-cursor: hand;
                               -fx-padding: 9 18 9 18;"/>
            </HBox>

        </VBox>
    </top>

    <center>
        <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true"
                    style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-background: transparent;
                           -fx-border-color: transparent;">
            <content>
                <VBox fx:id="postsContainer" spacing="16" alignment="TOP_CENTER">
                    <padding>
                        <Insets top="28" right="48" bottom="48" left="48"/>
                    </padding>
                </VBox>
            </content>
        </ScrollPane>
    </center>

</BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Button?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Label?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>

<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1"
            fx:controller="tn.esprit.controllers.forum.PostOverviewController"
            stylesheets="@macos-theme.css"
            styleClass="root-alt">

    <top>
        <VBox spacing="0">

            <!-- Top gradient accent bar -->
            <Region styleClass="gradient-accent"/>

            <!-- Header row -->
            <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="20"
                  styleClass="toolbar-card">
                <padding>
                    <Insets top="20" right="32" bottom="20" left="32"/>
                </padding>

                <VBox spacing="3">
                    <HBox spacing="8" alignment="CENTER_LEFT">
                        <Label text="●" style="-fx-text-fill: #3f72ff; -fx-font-size: 10px;"/>
                        <Label text="Community Forum"
                               styleClass="page-title"/>
                    </HBox>
                    <Label text="Browse discussions and share your thoughts with the community."
                           styleClass="page-subtitle"/>
                    <Label fx:id="currentUserLabel"
                           styleClass="section-title"/>
                </VBox>

                <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>

                <Button fx:id="adminPostsButton" text="Admin Posts" onAction="#handleOpenAdminPosts" managed="false" visible="false"
                        styleClass="secondary-button"/>

                <Button text="+ New Post" onAction="#handleCreatePost"
                        styleClass="primary-button"/>
            </HBox>

            <!-- Search and Filter bar -->
            <HBox spacing="10" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"
                  style="-fx-background-color: #f8faff;
                         -fx-border-color: transparent transparent #e8edf5 transparent;
                         -fx-border-width: 0 0 1 0;">
                <padding>
                    <Insets top="14" right="32" bottom="14" left="32"/>
                </padding>

                <TextField fx:id="searchField"
                           promptText="Search by title, topic, or content..."
                           onAction="#handleSearch"
                           style="-fx-background-color: white;
                                  -fx-border-color: #e2e8f0;
                                  -fx-border-radius: 9;
                                  -fx-background-radius: 9;
                                  -fx-border-width: 1.5;
                                  -fx-padding: 9 14 9 14;
                                  -fx-font-size: 13px;
                                  -fx-text-fill: #1e293b;
                                  -fx-prompt-text-fill: #94a3b8;"
                           HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>

                <ComboBox fx:id="typeFilterComboBox" onAction="#handleSearch"
                          style="-fx-background-color: white;
                                 -fx-border-color: #e2e8f0;
                                 -fx-border-radius: 9;
                                 -fx-background-radius: 9;
                                 -fx-border-width: 1.5;
                                 -fx-font-size: 13px;"
                          prefWidth="150"/>

                <ComboBox fx:id="topicFilterComboBox" onAction="#handleSearch"
                          style="-fx-background-color: white;
                                 -fx-border-color: #e2e8f0;
                                 -fx-border-radius: 9;
                                 -fx-background-radius: 9;
                                 -fx-border-width: 1.5;
                                 -fx-font-size: 13px;"
                          prefWidth="150"/>

                <Button text="Search" onAction="#handleSearch"
                        style="-fx-background-color: #6366f1;
                               -fx-text-fill: white;
                               -fx-font-weight: 700;
                               -fx-font-size: 13px;
                               -fx-background-radius: 9;
                               -fx-border-radius: 9;
                               -fx-cursor: hand;
                               -fx-padding: 9 20 9 20;"/>

                <Button text="Reset" onAction="#handleResetFilters"
                        style="-fx-background-color: white;
                               -fx-text-fill: #64748b;
                               -fx-font-weight: 600;
                               -fx-font-size: 13px;
                               -fx-background-radius: 9;
                               -fx-border-radius: 9;
                               -fx-border-color: #e2e8f0;
                               -fx-border-width: 1.5;
                               -fx-cursor: hand;
                               -fx-padding: 9 18 9 18;"/>
            </HBox>

        </VBox>
    </top>

    <center>
        <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true"
                    style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-background: transparent;
                           -fx-border-color: transparent;">
            <content>
                <VBox fx:id="postsContainer" spacing="16" alignment="TOP_CENTER">
                    <padding>
                        <Insets top="28" right="48" bottom="48" left="48"/>
                    </padding>
                </VBox>
            </content>
        </ScrollPane>
    </center>

</BorderPane>
